headline: Admissions
subheadline: Begin your child's journey with Thanya Primary School
intro: We welcome applications from parents and guardians throughout the year. Download the official learner application form below, complete it, and submit it to any of our three campuses along with the required supporting documents.

steps.title: Download the Form
steps.description: Click the download button below to get the official Thanya Primary School learner application form.

steps.title: Complete the Details
steps.description: Fill in learner information, parent/guardian details, and emergency contact information.

steps.title: Gather Supporting Documents
steps.description: Prepare a certified copy of the learner's birth certificate, proof of residence, and the most recent school report (if applicable).

steps.title: Submit to Your Nearest Campus
steps.description: Hand-deliver or email the completed form to the campus office of your choice. Our admissions team will contact you to confirm receipt.

requiredDocuments: Certified copy of learner's birth certificate
Proof of residence (not older than 3 months)
